---
title: ""
page-layout: custom
---

```{=html}
<div class="landing">

  <div class="landing-name">
    <div class="landing-en">Yu-You Liou</div>
    <div class="landing-divider"></div>
    <div class="landing-zh"
         data-en="劉昱佑" data-zh="劉昱佑">劉昱佑</div>
  </div>

  <div class="landing-footer">
    <p class="landing-tagline"
       data-en="Agricultural &amp; Environmental Economics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Urban &amp; Transportation Economics"
       data-zh="農業、環境與生態經濟學 &nbsp;·&nbsp; 都市、區域與交通經濟學">
      Agricultural &amp; Environmental Economics &nbsp;·&nbsp; Urban &amp; Transportation Economics
    </p>
    <nav class="landing-nav">
      <a href="about.html"
         data-en="About" data-zh="關於">About</a>
      <a href="research.html"
         data-en="Research" data-zh="研究">Research</a>
      <a href="teach.html"
         data-en="Teaching" data-zh="教學">Teaching</a>
      <a href="https://yyliou.github.io/yyliou/cv/cv.pdf" target="_blank"
         data-en="CV" data-zh="履歷">CV</a>
      <a href="mailto:d10627008@ntu.edu.tw"
         data-en="Email" data-zh="電郵">Email</a>
      <a href="https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=PXyiL0oAAAAJ&hl=zh-TW" target="_blank"
         data-en="Google Scholar" data-zh="Google 學術">Google Scholar</a>
      <a href="https://github.com/yyliou" target="_blank"
         data-en="GitHub" data-zh="GitHub">GitHub</a>
    </nav>
  </div>

</div>
```
